variants.title: HiFi Filter SH 670327 DIN Pressure Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 20160G25B000P
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SH 670327. This part is designed to meet high-performance standards, offering reliability and durability across a wide range of applications. Manufactured with precision and quality materials, it ensures optimal compatibility and functionality within your system, helping to maintain efficiency and extend the lifespan of your equipment. Whether used as part of a filtration system, hydraulic setup, or general machinery, this component delivers consistent performance under demanding conditions. Its robust construction and dependable design make it a trusted choice for maintaining system integrity and reducing downtime.
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 25µ

variants.title: Filtrec XD160T25B DIN Pressure Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 20160G25B000P
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec XD160T25B. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the XD160T25B provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.

variants.title: MicroFit® UltraGen III MFHHP41668 DIN Pressure Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 20160G25B000P
variants.description: Genuine MICROFIT® UltraGen III MFHHP41668. Engineered and manufactured in Great Britain the MFHHP41668 is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of OEM quality standards, ensuring superior filtration performance and the longest possible filter life. Building on over 50 years of filtration expertise, the UltraGen III series is the third generation of MICROFIT® filter media, delivering exceptional efficiency and reliability. FilterFinder is an approved distributor of MICROFIT® filters. With expert product knowledge, dedicated support, and a large stock availability, FilterFinder ensures you receive the parts you need when you need them, every time.
